title: HealthScore
description: Defines a computed health score snapshot for a LifeOS entity or the system as a whole. Scores are metadata-derived and never manually entered.

id.description: Unique health score record ID. Format: HSC-XXXX

entity_type.description: The type of entity being scored

entity_id.description: ID of the entity being scored (e.g. BIZ-XXXX, PRJ-XXXX, or 'system' for global)

computed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the score was computed

scores.description: All score dimensions applicable to this entity type

aggregate_score.description: Weighted average of all applicable scores

sources.description: Object IDs and fields that contributed to this score computation

flags.description: Specific issues detected during score computation

ScoreSet.description: Individual dimension scores. Only populate dimensions applicable to the entity type.

execution_score.description: How well work is being executed. See HEALTH_SCORING.md.

knowledge_score.description: Breadth, depth, and quality of the knowledge base.

business_health_score.description: KPI performance, risk posture, and strategic execution for a business.

repository_health_score.description: GitHub repository activity, CI health, and documentation.

project_health_score.description: Next action presence, deliverable status, and risk posture for a project.

ai_usage_score.description: How actively AI agents are being leveraged.

decision_velocity_score.description: Speed of resolving Proposed decisions to Final.

source_id.description: ID of the object that triggered this flag

days.description: Days overdue, stale, or open — where applicable
